Red-crested Pochard
More info
eBird
(Netta rufina)

  • 22/06/26 Whitesands Quarry 1 (Sam Shutt) "Known female. In a flock of Tufted duck and Pochard on the east side of the quarry, around the area of a dirt vehicle track. Best viewable from the view point on the opposite side of the quarry. Photographed."
  • 22/06/26 Whitesands Quarry From cement Works Side 1 (Stuart Housden) "Female, reported earlier"
  • 22/06/26 Whitesands Quarry 1 (David Kelly) "Known female associated with the Common Pochard. Larger grey coloured duck with pale cheeks and dark cap."

eBird
(Melanitta fusca) 100+

  • 26/06/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 2 (Evan Garner) "Tricky ID. Seen distantly with a scope. Prominent white wing patch. White mark under eye. Yellowish-orange bill. First impression was wing patch too broad and large for velvet scoter. Thought it was a Whit[...]"

Short-eared Owl
More info
eBird
(Asio flammeus)

  • 25/06/26 Threipmuir Reservoir 1 (Samuel Beerkens) "Large brown owl with powerful, slow wingbeats. Seen flying 4x ~100m at 10:30am through a section of open woodland on the east side of Harlaw reservoir, flying beneath the tree-tops. Wouldn't let me get clo[...]"

Kingfisher

Hobby
More info
eBird
(Falco subbuteo)

  • 24/06/26 Hopes Reservoir 2 (Sandeep Ramalingam) "Slightly larger than swallow. Pointed wings, dark birds. Flew past and into the valley."
  • 23/06/26 Hopes Reservoir 1 (Jarrod Hadfield) "Dark falcon with longer wings/tail than peregrine. Bold streaking on underparts stopped abruptly at a white cheek. Vent only slightly rufous so presumably 2cy."
  • 21/06/26 The Heugh, North Berwick 1 (Stephen Welch) "Bird flew rapidly north along line of road at c. 20m elevation, a slender dark falcon with pointed wing tips, naked eye view from c. 100m but unmistakable; drove up track to ridge beyond cottages and scann[...]"
